column3: She bought **some** apples at the store.
This bag is **too** heavy for me.
A **little** cat sat by the window.
I want to **thank** you for helping.
Do you have **any** questions for me?
She has **two** brothers and one sister.
The cat ran **away** from the dog.
That was a **great** dinner last night.
This is the **last** piece of cake.
This is a quiet **place** to read.
I have a **lot** of work today.
She **wanted** a new dress for summer.
She **left** her keys on the table.
He **came** home very late last night.
